# Hexagonal Architecture Template for Go
# Generated by Phenotype Repos Hub

## Directory Structure

```
{{module_name}}/
├── domain/                     # Pure domain logic (innermost layer)
│   ├── entities/             # Core business objects with identity
│   │   └── *.go
│   ├── valueobjects/         # Immutable types without identity
│   │   └── *.go
│   ├── aggregates/          # Aggregate roots managing consistency
│   │   └── *.go
│   ├── services/             # Domain services (cross-entity logic)
│   │   └── *.go
│   ├── events/               # Domain events
│   │   └── *.go
│   └── ports/                # Port interfaces
│       ├── inbound/         # Primary/driving ports
│       │   └── *.go
│       └── outbound/        # Secondary/driven ports
│           └── *.go
│
├── application/              # Application layer
│   ├── usecases/           # Application use cases
│   │   └── *.go
│   ├── dto/                # Data transfer objects
│   │   └── *.go
│   ├── commands/           # Command handlers
│   │   └── *.go
│   └── queries/            # Query handlers
│       └── *.go
│
├── adapters/               # Infrastructure adapters
│   ├── inbound/           # Primary adapters (API, CLI)
│   │   ├── http/          # REST handlers
│   │   │   └── *.go
│   │   └── cli/          # CLI commands
│   │       └── *.go
│   └── outbound/         # Secondary adapters
│       ├── persistence/  # Database implementations
│       │   └── *.go
│       ├── cache/        # Cache implementations
│       │   └── *.go
│       └── external/    # External service clients
│           └── *.go
│
├── cmd/
│   └── server/
│       └── main.go      # Application entry point
│
├── go.mod
├── go.sum
└── README.md
```

## Dependency Rule

```text
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    ADAPTERS (Outer)                     │
│   HTTP Handlers, CLI, DB, Cache, External Clients      │
└───────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
                            │ implements
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   PORTS (Interfaces)                    │
│         Primary: Use Case Inputs (inbound)             │
│        Secondary: Infrastructure Outputs (outbound)      │
└───────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
                            │ used by
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                 APPLICATION (Middle)                     │
│         Use Cases, Commands, Queries, DTOs              │
└───────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
                            │ uses
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    DOMAIN (Inner)                       │
│    Entities, Value Objects, Services, Events           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Example: Domain Entity (Go)

```go
// domain/entities/order.go
package entities

import (
    "{{module_name}}/domain/valueobjects"
    "{{module_name}}/domain/events"
)

type OrderStatus string

const (
    OrderStatusDraft     OrderStatus = "draft"
    OrderStatusConfirmed OrderStatus = "confirmed"
    OrderStatusShipped   OrderStatus = "shipped"
)

type Order struct {
    id      valueobjects.OrderID
    items   []OrderItem
    status  OrderStatus
    events  []events.DomainEvent
}

func NewOrder(id valueobjects.OrderID) *Order {
    return &Order{
        id:     id,
        items:  make([]OrderItem, 0),
        status: OrderStatusDraft,
        events: make([]events.DomainEvent, 0),
    }
}

func (o *Order) Confirm() error {
    if len(o.items) == 0 {
        return ErrEmptyOrder
    }
    o.status = OrderStatusConfirmed
    o.events = append(o.events, events.NewOrderConfirmed(o.id))
    return nil
}
```

## Example: Outbound Port (Interface)

```go
// domain/ports/outbound/order_repository.go
package ports

import (
    "{{module_name}}/domain/entities"
    "{{module_name}}/domain/valueobjects"
)

type OrderRepository interface {
    Save(ctx context.Context, order *entities.Order) error
    FindByID(ctx context.Context, id valueobjects.OrderID) (*entities.Order, error)
    FindAll(ctx context.Context) ([]*entities.Order, error)
}
```

## Example: Use Case

```go
// application/usecases/create_order.go
package usecases

import (
    "context"
    "{{module_name}}/application/dto"
    "{{module_name}}/domain/entities"
    "{{module_name}}/domain/ports"
    "{{module_name}}/domain/valueobjects"
)

type CreateOrderUseCase struct {
    repo ports.OrderRepository
}

func NewCreateOrderUseCase(repo ports.OrderRepository) *CreateOrderUseCase {
    return &CreateOrderUseCase{repo: repo}
}

func (uc *CreateOrderUseCase) Execute(ctx context.Context, cmd dto.CreateOrderCommand) (*entities.Order, error) {
    order := entities.NewOrder(valueobjects.NewOrderID())
    // ... add items, validate, etc.

    if err := uc.repo.Save(ctx, order); err != nil {
        return nil, err
    }

    return order, nil
}
```

## Testing Strategy

| Test Type | Location | What to Test |
|-----------|----------|--------------|
| Unit | `domain/*_test.go` | Entities, Value Objects, Domain Services |
| Unit | `application/*_test.go` | Use Cases |
| Integration | `adapters/*_test.go` | Adapter implementations |
| Contract | `tests/contracts/` | Verify adapter implements port correctly |
